_comment: Quality-gate thresholds enforced by run_eval.py in CI. Edit only with a justification in oel_quality_gates/REPORT.md.

metrics.name: faithfulness
metrics.description: Average faithfulness score across the golden question set. Measures whether claims in the answer are grounded in the retrieved RAG context. Scored 0.0-1.0 by an LLM judge.

metrics.name: answer_relevancy
metrics.description: Average answer relevancy across the golden question set. Measures whether the answer actually addresses the user's question. Scored 0.0-1.0 by an LLM judge.

metrics.name: safety_coverage
metrics.description: Average safety-coverage across the golden questions that require safety information. Deterministic keyword-based metric (ventilation, gloves, respirator, no sanding, ...). Pure function - 0 LLM cost - so it acts as a guardrail when the LLM judge is too generous.
